S.FORM: Renaldo Balkman hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa praw maki' tayglaing / pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas tay 1984, ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 7, Renaldo Balkman, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: renal*o ő≤alkman ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, qutux s~…ēa praw maki Ē taj…£laiŇč / pzjaŇč pkaki Ē taj ks~…ēka Ē. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, renal*o ő≤alkman, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
